name: kognisant-core
description: Kognisant Core - Native Rust Kernel + Electron + Vue 3

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "KERNEL,VITE,SHELL" -c "bgGreen.bold,bgBlue.bold,bgYellow.bold" "npm run dev:kernel" "npm run dev:frontend" "wait-on -t 60000 http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:kernel && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix rust-kernel install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules frontend/node_modules rust-kernel/node_modules rust-kernel/target frontend/dist
